description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, finished in matte black. The back features a prominent triple-lens camera module with an LED flash, positioned in the top left corner, and a centered Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge black screen with a small notch at the top, likely housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The sides are thin and smooth, with subtle seams indicating the presence of physical buttons, though they are not clearly visible. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a solid, premium build quality. Its compact size and refined design make it suitable for handheld use in various urban environments.
description: A sleek, matte black smartphone with a triple-lens rear camera and a large, edge-to-edge front screen. The design is modern and premium, featuring a centered Apple logo on the back.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the matte black finish, triple-lens camera module with flash in the top left, and a centered Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left side profile displaying the slimness of the device and the slight protrusion of the camera module.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large, black screen with a small notch at the top, and no visible buttons.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the thin edge and the camera bump's outline.
attribute_brand_logo: A black Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, visually subtle against the matte black finish.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is either turned off or in standby mode, with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a triple camera array with an LED flash located in the top left corner on the back, arranged in a rectangular module.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are not clearly visible, but typical placement would be on the left and right edges for volume and power functions.
